purpose: Internal-vs-Dean-facing vocabulary swaps. Build-time linter (scripts/lint-glossary.ts) enforces both the forbidden-string list (§13 success criteria) and the substitutions defined here against any Dean-facing surface (content/, src/ui templates, rendered HTML).

forbidden_literals.reason: design.v6 §13 — dean-facing UI must not contain this literal.
design.v6 §13. Refers to the dataset/NPRM internally; surface as 'the federal data the Department uses' or 'the federal rule'.

condescending_terms.reason: v6 §3-§5 peer-voice rule: no condescending phrasing.
v6 §3-§5 peer-voice rule — reader is a Dean, not a novice.

internal_to_dean_facing.notes: Use 'expansion' as the noun. Stages of the expansion are described as 'expanded over X years' or 'pooled with related programs at the wider CIP family'.

internal_to_dean_facing.dean_facing: single-year cohort at the program's own CIP
expanded over multiple years at the program's own CIP
pooled with related programs at the 4-digit CIP family
pooled with related programs at the 2-digit CIP family
wider CIP family / wider program group
the federal data the Department uses

internal_to_dean_facing.notes: PPD as a literal token is acceptable in field-name contexts (e.g., 'Source: PPD field …'); not as a standalone Dean-facing term.

internal_to_dean_facing.dean_facing: graduates who are not still in school and are working

internal_to_dean_facing.internal: median earnings of working not enrolled
internal_to_dean_facing.dean_facing: earnings of graduates who are working and not still in school
gap between your graduates' median earnings and the benchmark

internal_to_dean_facing.notes: Engine JSON keys are exempt; the linter scopes to Dean-facing strings (content/ + UI templates). The literal token must not appear in rendered HTML.

internal_to_dean_facing.dean_facing: the figure your program is compared against
the Department's own analysis of which programs are most at risk
the federal data product the Department published in advance of the rulemaking

internal_to_dean_facing.notes: Listed in cp-0on.2 issue body as a Dean-facing-forbidden token; tool-internal token only.

internal_to_dean_facing.dean_facing: snapshot metadata (build date, federal-data release, noise-band count, cross-validation status)
Re-derive against primary sources before any external submission
